scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:site: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:5000 pnpm --filter @workspace/primeaxis run dev
scripts.dev:studio: cross-env PORT=3333 pnpm --filter primeaxis-studio run dev
